paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] TranslateGemma Technical Report, Mara Finkelstein+, arXiv'26, 2026.01
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, NLP, LanguageModel, SmallModel, MultiLingual, OpenWeight, Selected Papers/Blogs, One-Line Notes, Initial Impression Notes
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - preprint: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.09012 - blog: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/translategemma/ # Authors - Mara Finkelstein - Isaac Caswell - Tobias Domhan - Jan-Thorsten Peter - Juraj Juraska - Parker Riley - Daniel Deutsch - Cole Dilanni - Colin Cherry - Eleftheria Briakou - Elizabeth Nielsen - Jiaming Luo - Kat Black - Ryan Mullins - Sweta Agrawal - Wenda Xu - Erin Kats - Stephane Jaskiewicz - Markus Freitag - David Vilar # Abstract - We present TranslateGemma, a suite of open machine translation models based on the Gemma 3 foundation models. To enhance the inherent multilingual capabilities of Gemma 3 for the translation task, we employ a two-stage fine-tuning process. First, supervised fine-tuning is performed using a rich mixture of high-quality large-scale synthetic parallel data generated via state-of-the-art models and human-translated parallel data. This is followed by a reinforcement learning phase, where we optimize translation quality using an ensemble of reward models, including MetricX-QE and AutoMQM, targeting translation quality. We demonstrate the effectiveness of TranslateGemma with human evaluation on the WMT25 test set across 10 language pairs and with automatic evaluation on the WMT24++ benchmark across 55 language pairs. Automatic metrics show consistent and substantial gains over the baseline Gemma 3 models across all sizes. Notably, smaller TranslateGemma models often achieve performance comparable to larger baseline models, offering improved efficiency. We also show that TranslateGemma models retain strong multimodal capabilities, with enhanced performance on the Vistra image translation benchmark. The release of the open TranslateGemma models aims to provide the research community with powerful and adaptable tools for machine translation. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - з§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜTranslateGemmaгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜGemma 3еҹәзӣӨгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігҒӘж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮзҝ»иЁігӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢGemma 3гҒ®еӣәжңүгҒ®еӨҡиЁҖиӘһиғҪеҠӣгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒдәҢж®өйҡҺгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҡгҖҒй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎеҗҲжҲҗе№іиЎҢгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒЁдәәй–“гҒҢзҝ»иЁігҒ—гҒҹе№іиЎҢгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒзӣЈиҰ–д»ҳгҒҚгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’иЎҢгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮж¬ЎгҒ«гҖҒзҝ»иЁігҒ®иіӘгӮ’жңҖйҒ©еҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒMetricX-QEгӮ„AutoMQMгӮ’еҗ«гӮҖе ұй…¬гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гӮўгғігӮөгғігғ–гғ«гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹеј·еҢ–еӯҰзҝ’гҒ®ж®өйҡҺгҒҢз¶ҡгҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮTranslateGemmaгҒ®жңүеҠ№жҖ§гӮ’гҖҒ10гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўгҒ«гӮҸгҒҹгӮӢWMT25гғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҒ®дәәй–“и©•дҫЎгҒЁгҖҒ55гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўгҒ«гӮҸгҒҹгӮӢWMT24++гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒ®иҮӘеӢ•и©•дҫЎгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰзӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮиҮӘеӢ•жҢҮжЁҷгҒҜгҖҒгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®гӮөгӮӨгӮәгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігҒ®Gemma 3гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰдёҖиІ«гҒ—гҒҹеӨ§е№…гҒӘеҗ‘дёҠгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒе°ҸеһӢгҒ®TranslateGemmaгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒеӨ§еһӢгҒ®гғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еҢ№ж•өгҒҷгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’гҒ—гҒ°гҒ—гҒ°йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒеҠ№зҺҮгҒҢеҗ‘дёҠгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒTranslateGemmaгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гҒӘиғҪеҠӣгӮ’дҝқжҢҒгҒ—гҖҒVistraз”»еғҸзҝ»иЁігғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒ®жҖ§иғҪгҒҢеҗ‘дёҠгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮӮзӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігҒӘTranslateGemmaгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғӘгғӘгғјгӮ№гҒҜгҖҒз ”з©¶гӮігғҹгғҘгғӢгғҶгӮЈгҒ«еј·еҠӣгҒ§йҒ©еҝңеҸҜиғҪгҒӘж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒ®гғ„гғјгғ«гӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®зҡ„гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - TranslateGemmaгҒҜгҖҒGemma 3гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒ®гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігғўгғҮгғ«гӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҖҒдәҢж®өйҡҺгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҖӮеҲқгӮҒгҒ«й«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘдёҰиЎҢгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ§зӣЈиҰ–д»ҳгҒҚгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’иЎҢгҒ„гҖҒгҒқгҒ®еҫҢе ұй…¬гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«гӮҲгӮӢеј·еҢ–еӯҰзҝ’гҒ§зҝ»иЁіе“ҒиіӘгӮ’жңҖйҒ©еҢ–гҖӮWMT25гғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҒ®дәәй–“и©•дҫЎгҒЁWMT24++гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒ®иҮӘеӢ•и©•дҫЎгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰжңүеҠ№жҖ§гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒиҮӘеӢ•жҢҮжЁҷгҒ§гҒҜеӨ§е№…гҒӘжҖ§иғҪеҗ‘дёҠгҒҢзўәиӘҚгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮзү№гҒ«е°ҸеһӢгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜеӨ§еһӢгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еҢ№ж•өгҒҷгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’жҢҒгҒЎгҒӨгҒӨеҠ№зҺҮгҒҢеҗ‘дёҠгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«иғҪеҠӣгӮӮдҝқжҢҒгҒ—гҖҒз”»еғҸзҝ»иЁігғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒ®жҖ§иғҪеҗ‘дёҠгҒҢе ұе‘ҠгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮTranslateGemmaгҒ®е…¬й–ӢгҒҜгҖҒз ”з©¶гӮігғҹгғҘгғӢгғҶгӮЈгҒ«еј·еҠӣгҒ§йҒ©еҝңеҸҜиғҪгҒӘзҝ»иЁігғ„гғјгғ«гӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®жҢҮгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ

й–ўйҖЈ:
- PLaMo Translate: зҝ»иЁізү№еҢ–еӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®й–Ӣзҷә,д»ҠеҹҺ+, Jxiv'25, 2025.08
- [Paper Note] Hunyuan-MT Technical Report, Mao Zheng+, arXiv'25, 2025.09

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] SSA-COMET: Do LLMs Outperform Learned Metrics in Evaluating MT for Under-Resourced African Languages?, Senyu Li+, EMNLP'25, 2025.06
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, Metrics, NLP, Dataset, LanguageModel, Evaluation, Reference-free, EMNLP, LowResource
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.04557 # Authors - Senyu Li - Jiayi Wang - Felermino D. M. A. Ali - Colin Cherry - Daniel Deutsch - Eleftheria Briakou - Rui Sousa-Silva - Henrique Lopes Cardoso - Pontus Stenetorp - David Ifeoluwa Adelani # Abstract - Evaluating machine translation (MT) quality for under-resourced African languages remains a significant challenge, as existing metrics often suffer from limited language coverage and poor performance in low-resource settings. While recent efforts, such as AfriCOMET, have addressed some of the issues, they are still constrained by small evaluation sets, a lack of publicly available training data tailored to African languages, and inconsistent performance in extremely low-resource scenarios. In this work, we introduce SSA-MTE, a large-scale human-annotated MT evaluation (MTE) dataset covering 13 African language pairs from the News domain, with over 63,000 sentence-level annotations from a diverse set of MT systems. Based on this data, we develop SSA-COMET and SSA-COMET-QE, improved reference-based and reference-free evaluation metrics. We also benchmark prompting-based approaches using state-of-the-art LLMs like GPT-4o and Claude. Our experimental results show that SSA-COMET models significantly outperform AfriCOMET and are competitive with the strongest LLM (Gemini 2.5 Pro) evaluated in our study, particularly on low-resource languages such as Twi, Luo, and Yoruba. All resources are released under open licenses to support future research. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіпјҲMTпјүгҒ®е“ҒиіӘи©•дҫЎгҒҜгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢйҷҗгӮүгӮҢгҒҹгӮўгғ•гғӘгӮ«гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеӨ§гҒҚгҒӘиӘІйЎҢгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒж—ўеӯҳгҒ®жҢҮжЁҷгҒҜгҒ—гҒ°гҒ—гҒ°иЁҖиӘһгӮ«гғҗгғ¬гғғгӮёгҒҢйҷҗгӮүгӮҢгҖҒдҪҺгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№з’°еўғгҒ§гҒ®жҖ§иғҪгҒҢдёҚеҚҒеҲҶгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮжңҖиҝ‘гҒ®еҸ–гӮҠзө„гҒҝгҖҒдҫӢгҒҲгҒ°AfriCOMETгҒҜдёҖйғЁгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгҒ«еҜҫеҮҰгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе°ҸиҰҸжЁЎгҒӘи©•дҫЎгӮ»гғғгғҲгӮ„гӮўгғ•гғӘгӮ«гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹе…¬й–ӢгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ®дёҚи¶ігҖҒжҘөгӮҒгҒҰдҪҺгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ®гӮ·гғҠгғӘгӮӘгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ®гҒӘгҒ„жҖ§иғҪгҒ«еҲ¶зҙ„гҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгғӢгғҘгғјгӮ№гғүгғЎгӮӨгғігҒӢгӮүгҒ®13гҒ®гӮўгғ•гғӘгӮ«иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўгӮ’гӮ«гғҗгғјгҒҷгӮӢеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘдәәй–“жіЁйҮҲд»ҳгҒҚMTи©•дҫЎпјҲMTEпјүгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢSSA-MTEгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘMTгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒӢгӮүгҒ®63,000д»ҘдёҠгҒ®ж–Үгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®жіЁйҮҲгҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒж”№иүҜгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹеҸӮз…§гғҷгғјгӮ№гҒҠгӮҲгҒіеҸӮз…§гғ•гғӘгғјгҒ®и©•дҫЎжҢҮжЁҷгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢSSA-COMETгҒЁSSA-COMET-QEгӮ’й–ӢзҷәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒGPT-4oгӮ„ClaudeгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®LLMгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҹгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгӮ’гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒSSA-COMETгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҢAfriCOMETгӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«дёҠеӣһгӮҠгҖҒзү№гҒ«TwiгҖҒLuoгҖҒYorubaгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®дҪҺгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒжҲ‘гҖ…гҒ®з ”з©¶гҒ§и©•дҫЎгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжңҖеј·гҒ®LLMпјҲGemini 2.5 ProпјүгҒЁз«¶дәүеҠӣгҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®гғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҜгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігғ©гӮӨгӮ»гғігӮ№гҒ®дёӢгҒ§е…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҖҒд»ҠеҫҢгҒ®з ”з©¶гӮ’ж”ҜжҸҙгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гӮўгғ•гғӘгӮ«гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒ®е“ҒиіӘи©•дҫЎгҒҜдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰиӘІйЎҢгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒж—ўеӯҳгҒ®жҢҮжЁҷгҒҜйҷҗгӮүгӮҢгҒҹжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ13гҒ®гӮўгғ•гғӘгӮ«иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўгӮ’еҜҫиұЎгҒЁгҒ—гҒҹеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘдәәй–“жіЁйҮҲд»ҳгҒҚMTи©•дҫЎгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҖҢSSA-MTEгҖҚгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҖҒ63,000д»ҘдёҠгҒ®ж–Үгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®жіЁйҮҲгӮ’еҗ«гӮ“гҒ§гҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҚгҖҒж”№иүҜгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹи©•дҫЎжҢҮжЁҷгҖҢSSA-COMETгҖҚгҒЁгҖҢSSA-COMET-QEгҖҚгӮ’й–ӢзҷәгҒ—гҖҒжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®LLMгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгӮ’гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒSSA-COMETгҒҢAfriCOMETгӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮҠгҖҒзү№гҒ«дҪҺгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒ§з«¶дәүеҠӣгҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®гғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҜгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігғ©гӮӨгӮ»гғігӮ№гҒ§е…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Multilingual Language Model Pretraining using Machine-translated Data, Jiayi Wang+, EMNLP'25, 2025.02
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, Pretraining, NLP, Dataset, LanguageModel
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.13252 # Authors - Jiayi Wang - Yao Lu - Maurice Weber - Max Ryabinin - David Adelani - Yihong Chen - Raphael Tang - Pontus Stenetorp # Abstract - High-resource languages such as English, enables the pretraining of high-quality large language models (LLMs). The same can not be said for most other languages as LLMs still underperform for non-English languages, likely due to a gap in the quality and diversity of the available multilingual pretraining corpora. In this work, we find that machine-translated texts from a single high-quality source language can contribute significantly to the pretraining quality of multilingual LLMs. We translate FineWeb-Edu, a high-quality English web dataset, into nine languages, resulting in a 1.7-trillion-token dataset, which we call TransWebEdu and pretrain a 1.3B-parameter model, TransWebLLM, from scratch on this dataset. Across nine non-English reasoning tasks, we show that TransWebLLM matches or outperforms state-of-the-art multilingual models trained using closed data, such as Llama3.2, Qwen2.5, and Gemma, despite using an order of magnitude less data. We demonstrate that adding less than 5% of TransWebEdu as domain-specific pretraining data sets a new state-of-the-art in Arabic, Italian, Indonesian, Swahili, and Welsh understanding and commonsense reasoning tasks. To promote reproducibility, we release our corpus, models, and training pipeline under Open Source Initiative-approved licenses. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - й«ҳгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢиӢұиӘһгҒҜгҖҒй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲLLMsпјүгҒ®дәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гӮ’еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒд»–гҒ®еӨҡгҒҸгҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜгҖҒеҲ©з”ЁеҸҜиғҪгҒӘеӨҡиЁҖиӘһдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҒ®иіӘгҒЁеӨҡж§ҳжҖ§гҒ®гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒLLMsгҒҜдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰйқһиӢұиӘһиЁҖиӘһгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰеҠЈгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒЁиЁҖгҒҲгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒеҚҳдёҖгҒ®й«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒӢгӮүгҒ®ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒҢеӨҡиЁҖиӘһLLMsгҒ®дәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒ®иіӘгҒ«еӨ§гҒҚгҒҸеҜ„дёҺгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зҷәиҰӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҒй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘиӢұиӘһгҒ®гӮҰгӮ§гғ–гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢFineWeb-EduгӮ’9гҒӨгҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«зҝ»иЁігҒ—гҖҒ17е…ҶгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгӮ’TransWebEduгҒЁе‘јгҒігҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰ1.3Bгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«TransWebLLMгӮ’гӮјгғӯгҒӢгӮүдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ9гҒӨгҒ®йқһиӢұиӘһгҒ®жҺЁи«–гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒTransWebLLMгҒҜгҖҒLlama3.2гҖҒQwen2.5гҖҒGemmaгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®гӮҜгғӯгғјгӮәгғүгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰиЁ“з·ҙгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®еӨҡиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҗҢзӯүгҒӢгҒқгӮҢд»ҘдёҠгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҖҒдҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝйҮҸгҒҜжЎҒйҒ•гҒ„гҒ«е°‘гҒӘгҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮTransWebEduгҒ®5%жңӘжәҖгӮ’гғүгғЎгӮӨгғізү№еҢ–гҒ®дәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰиҝҪеҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒгӮўгғ©гғ“гӮўиӘһгҖҒгӮӨгӮҝгғӘгӮўиӘһгҖҒгӮӨгғігғүгғҚгӮ·гӮўиӘһгҖҒгӮ№гғҜгғ’гғӘиӘһгҖҒгӮҰгӮ§гғјгғ«гӮәиӘһгҒ®зҗҶи§ЈгҒҠгӮҲгҒіеёёиӯҳжҺЁи«–гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰж–°гҒҹгҒӘжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҒҹгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеҶҚзҸҫжҖ§гӮ’дҝғйҖІгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҖҒгҒҠгӮҲгҒігғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғ‘гӮӨгғ—гғ©гӮӨгғігӮ’гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гӮӨгғӢгӮ·гӮўгғҶгӮЈгғ–жүҝиӘҚгҒ®гғ©гӮӨгӮ»гғігӮ№гҒ®дёӢгҒ§е…¬й–ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - й«ҳгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒ®иӢұиӘһгҒӢгӮүзҝ»иЁігҒ—гҒҹй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒҢгҖҒеӨҡиЁҖиӘһLLMsгҒ®дәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒ«еҜ„дёҺгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зҷәиҰӢгҖӮиӢұиӘһгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲFineWeb-EduгӮ’9иЁҖиӘһгҒ«зҝ»иЁігҒ—гҖҒ17е…ҶгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒ®TransWebEduгӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҖӮ1.3Bгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгҒ®TransWebLLMгӮ’дәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҖҒйқһиӢұиӘһгҒ®жҺЁи«–гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҗҢзӯүд»ҘдёҠгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒгғүгғЎгӮӨгғізү№еҢ–гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’иҝҪеҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒгҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ§ж–°гҒҹгҒӘжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҖӮгӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҖҒгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғ‘гӮӨгғ—гғ©гӮӨгғігҒҜгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ§е…¬й–ӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Hunyuan-MT Technical Report, Mao Zheng+, arXiv'25, 2025.09
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, NLP, LanguageModel, action_wanted, OpenWeight, Catastrophic Forgetting, mid-training, Selected Papers/Blogs, In-Depth Notes, Surface-level Notes
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.05209 # Authors - Mao Zheng - Zheng Li - Bingxin Qu - Mingyang Song - Yang Du - Mingrui Sun - Di Wang # Abstract - In this report, we introduce Hunyuan-MT-7B, our first open-source multilingual translation model, which supports bidirectional translation across 33 major languages and places a special emphasis on translation between Mandarin and several ethnic minority languages as well as dialects. Furthermore, to serve and address diverse translation scenarios and enhance model performance at test time, we introduce Hunyuan-MT-Chimera-7B, a translation model inspired by the slow thinking mode. This model integrates multiple outputs generated by the Hunyuan-MT-7B model under varying parameter settings, thereby achieving performance superior to that of conventional slow-thinking models based on Chain-of-Thought (CoT). The development of our models follows a holistic training process specifically engineered for multilingual translation, which begins with general and MT-oriented pre-training to build foundational capabilities, proceeds to Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for task-specific adaptation, and culminates in advanced alignment through Reinforcement Learning (RL) and weak-to-strong RL. Through comprehensive experimentation, we demonstrate that both Hunyuan-MT-7B and Hunyuan-MT-Chimera-7B significantly outperform all translation-specific models of comparable parameter size and most of the SOTA large models, particularly on the task of translation between Mandarin and minority languages as well as dialects. In the WMT2025 shared task (General Machine Translation), our models demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, ranking first in 30 out of 31 language pairs. This result highlights the robustness of our models across a diverse linguistic spectrum, encompassing high-resource languages such as Chinese, English, and Japanese, as well as low-resource languages including Czech, Marathi, Estonian, and Icelandic. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - гҒ“гҒ®е ұе‘ҠгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ33гҒ®дё»иҰҒиЁҖиӘһй–“гҒ§гҒ®еҸҢж–№еҗ‘зҝ»иЁігӮ’гӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒҷгӮӢеҲқгҒ®гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№еӨҡиЁҖиӘһзҝ»иЁігғўгғҮгғ«гҖҒHunyuan-MT-7BгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒжЁҷжә–дёӯеӣҪиӘһгҒЁгҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒ®ж°‘ж—Ҹе°‘ж•°иЁҖиӘһгӮ„ж–№иЁҖй–“гҒ®зҝ»иЁігҒ«зү№гҒ«йҮҚзӮ№гӮ’зҪ®гҒ„гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒгҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘзҝ»иЁігӮ·гғҠгғӘгӮӘгҒ«еҜҫеҝңгҒ—гҖҒгғҶгӮ№гғҲжҷӮгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«жҖ§иғҪгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒгӮ№гғӯгғјгӮ№гғӯгғјгғҒгғігӮӯгғігӮ°гғўгғјгғүгҒ«гӮӨгғігӮ№гғ‘гӮӨгӮўгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹзҝ»иЁігғўгғҮгғ«Hunyuan-MT-Chimera-7BгӮӮе°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒз•°гҒӘгӮӢгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝиЁӯе®ҡгҒ®дёӢгҒ§Hunyuan-MT-7BгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰз”ҹжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹиӨҮж•°гҒ®еҮәеҠӣгӮ’зөұеҗҲгҒ—гҖҒChain-of-ThoughtпјҲCoTпјүгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸеҫ“жқҘгҒ®гӮ№гғӯгғјгӮ№гғӯгғјгғҒгғігӮӯгғігӮ°гғўгғҮгғ«гӮҲгӮҠгӮӮе„ӘгӮҢгҒҹжҖ§иғҪгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®й–ӢзҷәгҒҜгҖҒеӨҡиЁҖиӘһзҝ»иЁігҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹеҢ…жӢ¬зҡ„гҒӘгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гҒ«еҫ“гҒЈгҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒеҹәзӣӨиғҪеҠӣгӮ’ж§ӢзҜүгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®дёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒ§MTеҝ—еҗ‘гҒ®дәӢеүҚгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒӢгӮүе§ӢгҒҫгӮҠгҖҒгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜеӣәжңүгҒ®йҒ©еҝңгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®ж•ҷеё«гҒӮгӮҠгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°пјҲSFTпјүгӮ’зөҢгҒҰгҖҒеј·еҢ–еӯҰзҝ’пјҲRLпјүгҒЁејұгҒӢгӮүеј·гҒёгҒ®RLгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢй«ҳеәҰгҒӘж•ҙеҗҲжҖ§гҒ«иҮігӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеҢ…жӢ¬зҡ„гҒӘе®ҹйЁ“гӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгҖҒHunyuan-MT-7BгҒЁHunyuan-MT-Chimera-7BгҒ®дёЎж–№гҒҢгҖҒеҗҢзӯүгҒ®гғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгӮөгӮӨгӮәгҒ®гҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®зҝ»иЁізү№еҢ–гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ„гҖҒгҒ»гҒЁгӮ“гҒ©гҒ®жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®еӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«дёҠеӣһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒжЁҷжә–дёӯеӣҪиӘһгҒЁе°‘ж•°иЁҖиӘһгӮ„ж–№иЁҖй–“гҒ®зҝ»иЁігӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰйЎ•и‘—гҒӘжҲҗжһңгӮ’дёҠгҒ’гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮWMT2025е…ұжңүгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜпјҲдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒӘж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіпјүгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒ31гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўдёӯ30гҒ§1дҪҚгӮ’зҚІеҫ—гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒдёӯеӣҪиӘһгҖҒиӢұиӘһгҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®й«ҳгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒ гҒ‘гҒ§гҒӘгҒҸгҖҒгғҒгӮ§гӮіиӘһгҖҒгғһгғ©гғјгғҶгӮЈгғјиӘһгҖҒгӮЁгӮ№гғҲгғӢгӮўиӘһгҖҒгӮўгӮӨгӮ№гғ©гғігғүиӘһгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®дҪҺгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№иЁҖиӘһгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮгҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®е …зүўжҖ§гӮ’йҡӣз«ӢгҒҹгҒӣгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - Hunyuan-MT-7BгҒҜгҖҒ33гҒ®дё»иҰҒиЁҖиӘһй–“гҒ®еҸҢж–№еҗ‘зҝ»иЁігӮ’гӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒҷгӮӢеҲқгҒ®гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒзү№гҒ«жЁҷжә–дёӯеӣҪиӘһгҒЁе°‘ж•°иЁҖиӘһй–“гҒ®зҝ»иЁігҒ«з„ҰзӮ№гӮ’еҪ“гҒҰгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮ№гғӯгғјгӮ№гғӯгғјгғҒгғігӮӯгғігӮ°гҒ«и§ҰзҷәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹHunyuan-MT-Chimera-7BгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®еҮәеҠӣгӮ’зөұеҗҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§жҖ§иғҪгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜеҢ…жӢ¬зҡ„гҒӘгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’зөҢгҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒеј·еҢ–еӯҰзҝ’гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹй«ҳеәҰгҒӘж•ҙеҗҲжҖ§гӮ’е®ҹзҸҫгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒдёЎгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҢеҗҢзӯүгҒ®гғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгӮөгӮӨгӮәгҒ®д»–гҒ®зҝ»иЁігғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮҠгҖҒWMT2025е…ұжңүгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§30гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўгҒ§1дҪҚгӮ’зҚІеҫ—гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®е …зүўжҖ§гҒҢеј·иӘҝгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

maintainer-comment-text.p: Base ModelгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгҒҫгҒҡдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒӘдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒ—гҖҒгҒқгҒ®еҫҢMTгҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹз¶ҷз¶ҡдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’пјҲгғўгғҺгғӘгғігӮ¬гғ«/гғ‘гғ©гғ¬гғ«гӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҒ®еҲ©з”ЁпјүгҖҒдәӢеҫҢеӯҰзҝ’пјҲSFT, GRPO)гӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢжЁЎж§ҳгҖӮ з¶ҷз¶ҡдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒжңҖйҒ©гҒӘDataMixгҒ®жҜ”зҺҮгӮ’иҰӢгҒӨгҒ‘гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒRegMixгҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢжүӢжі•гӮ’еҲ©з”ЁгҖӮCatastrophic SFTгҒ§гҒҜ2гҒӨгҒ®гӮ№гғҶгғјгӮёгҒ§ж§ӢжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮгӮ№гғҶгғјгӮё1гҒҜеҹәзӨҺзҡ„гҒӘзҝ»иЁіеҠӣгҒ®еј·еҢ–гҒЁзҝ»иЁігҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢжҢҮзӨәиҝҪеҫ“иғҪеҠӣгҒ®еҗ‘дёҠгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒFlores-200гҒ®й–ӢзҷәгғҮгғјгӮҝ(33иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еҸҢж–№еҗ‘гҒ®зҝ»иЁігӮ’гӮ«гғҗгғј)гҖҒеүҚе№ҙеәҰгҒ®WMTгҒ®гғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ»гғғгғҲ(English to XXгӮ’гӮ«гғҗгғјпјүгҖҒMandarin to Minority, Minority to MandarinгҒ®curatedгҒӘдәәжүӢгҒ§гҒ®гӮўгғҺгғҶгғјгӮ·гғ§гғігғҮгғјгӮҝгҖҒDeepSeek-V3-0324гҒ§гҒ®еҗҲжҲҗгғ‘гғ©гғ¬гғ«гӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҖҒgeneral purpose/MT orientedгҒӘжҢҮзӨәгғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ®гҒҶгҒЎ20%гӮ’ж§ӢжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ§зҝ»иЁігҒ®instructinoгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®еҮЎеҢ–жҖ§иғҪгӮ’й«ҳгӮҒгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгӮӯгғҘгғ¬гғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝгҖҒгҒ§еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢжЁЎж§ҳгҖӮгғ‘гғ©гғ¬гғ«гӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҒҜReference-freeгҒӘжүӢжі•гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰгӮ№гӮігӮўгӮ’з®—еҮәгҒ—й–ҫеҖӨд»ҘдёӢгҒ®дҪҺе“ҒиіӘгҒӘзҝ»иЁіеҜҫгҒҜйҷӨеӨ–гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮгӮ№гғҶгғјгӮё2гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒи©ізҙ°гҒҢжӣёгҒӢгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҒҢгҖҒе°‘йҮҸгҒ§гӮҲгӮҠfidelityгҒ®й«ҳгҒ„зҙ„270kгҒ®зҝ»иЁіеҜҫгӮ’еҲ©з”ЁгҒ—гҒҹжЁЎж§ҳгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒе…ҲиЎҢз ”з©¶гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒmany-shotгҒ®in-context learningгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒиЁ“з·ҙгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’гҒ•гӮүгҒ«жҙ—з·ҙгҒ•гҒӣгҒҹгҒЁгҒ®гҒ“гҒЁпјҲе…ҲиЎҢз ”з©¶гҒҢеј•з”ЁгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ®гҒҝгҒ§и©ізҙ°гҒӘиЁҳиҝ°гҒҜз„ЎгҒ—пјүгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®и©•дҫЎгғ©гӮҰгғігғүгҒ§гӮ№гӮігӮўгҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒҢз„ЎгҒ„гӮөгғігғ—гғ«гҒҜжүӢеӢ•гҒ§гӮўгғҺгғҶгғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҖҒгҒӮгӮӢгҒ„гҒҜverificationгӮ’гҒ—гҒҰе“ҒиіӘгӮ’жӢ…дҝқгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢжЁЎж§ҳгҖӮ RLгҒ§гҒҜGRPOгӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҒ—гҖҒrewardгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰsemantic([Paper Note] xCOMET: Transparent Machine Translation Evaluation through Fine-grained Error Detection, Nuno M. Guerreiro+, TACL'24 ), terminology([Paper Note] TAT-R1: Terminology-Aware Translation with Reinforcement Learning and Word Alignment, Zheng Li+, arXiv'25 ; гғүгғЎгӮӨгғізү№жңүгҒ®terminologyгӮ’жҚүгҒҲгӮӢ), repetitionгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҹrewardгӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮжңҖзөӮзҡ„гҒ«SFT->RLгҒ§еӯҰзҝ’гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹHuayuan-MT-7BгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒдёӢиЁҳгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰиӨҮж•°гҒ®outputгӮ’зөұеҗҲгҒ—гҒҰгӮҲгӮҠй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘзҝ»иЁігӮ’еҮәеҠӣгҒҷгӮӢгӮӯгғЎгғ©гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’еҗҢж§ҳгҒ®rewardгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰеӯҰзҝ’гҒҷгӮӢгҖҒгҒЁгҒ„гҒЈгҒҹpipelineгҒ«гҒӘгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ

гҒ“гҒЎгӮүгҒҜSFT->Iterative DPO->Model MergeгӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒ—гҖҒзҝ»иЁігҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹз¶ҷз¶ҡдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒҜгӮ„гҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«иҰӢгҒҲгӮӢгҖӮдёҖж–№гҖҒSFTжҷӮзӮ№гҒ§зӢ¬иҮӘгҒ®гғҶгғігғ—гғ¬гғјгғҲгӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҖҒиӘһеҪҷгҒ®жҢҮе®ҡгӮ„гӮ№гӮҝгӮӨгғ«гҖҒж—Ҙжң¬иӘһзү№жңүгҒ®еёёдҪ“гҖҒж•¬дҪ“гҒ®жҢҮе®ҡгҒӘгҒ©гӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«зҝ»иЁігҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹгғҶгғігғ—гғ¬гғјгғҲгӮ’еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢзӮ№гҒҢз•°гҒӘгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«иҰӢгҒҲгӮӢгҖӮHunyuanгҒҜеӨҡж§ҳгҒӘзҝ»иЁігҒ®жҢҮзӨәгҒ«еҜҫеҝңгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҢгҖҒPLaMoзҝ»иЁігҒҜгғҰгғјгӮ№гӮұгғјгӮ№гӮ’зөһгӮҠиҫјгҒҝгҖҒгғҰгғјгӮ№гӮұгғјгӮ№гҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’й«ҳгӮҒгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒӘзү№еҢ–еһӢгҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгӮ’гҒЁгӮӢгҒЁгҒ„гҒЈгҒҹжҖқжғігҒ®йҒ•гҒ„гҒҢдјәгҒҲгӮӢгҖӮ

maintainer-comment-text.p:
SFT->Iterative DPO->Model MergeгҒ®гғ‘гӮӨгғ—гғ©гӮӨгғігҖӮSFTгҒ§гҒҜйқ’з©әж–Үеә«гҒӘгҒ©гҒ®гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігҒӘгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒӢгӮүжҢҮзӨәиҝҪеҫ“жҖ§иғҪгҒ®й«ҳгҒ„DeepSeek-V3-0324гҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰе…ғгғҮгғјгӮҝвҶ’зҝ»иЁі, зҝ»иЁівҶ’еҶҚзҝ»иЁігғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’еҗҲжҲҗгҒ—жҙ»з”ЁгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒзҝ»иЁігҒ®жҢҮзӨәгҒҢpromptдёӯгҒ«еӯҳеңЁгҒӣгҒҡгҒЁгӮӮпјҲжң¬гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’еҲ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ®гҒҜзҝ»иЁіз”ЁйҖ”гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢиҮӘжҳҺгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒӢгӮүгҒЁжҺЁеҜҹгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢпјүзҝ»иЁігӮ’йҒ©еҲҮгҒ«е®ҹиЎҢгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҖҒзӢ¬иҮӘгҒ®гғҶгғігғ—гғ¬гғјгғҲгӮ’еӯҰзҝ’гҖӮж–ҮдҪ“жҢҮе®ҡгҖҒеёёдҪ“гҖҒж•¬дҪ“гҒ®жҢҮе®ҡгҖҒж–Үи„ҲиҖғж…®гҖҒиӘһеҪҷжҢҮе®ҡгҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢгҒ«гҒҶгҒ„гҒҰзӢ¬иҮӘгҒ®гӮҝгӮ°гӮ’иЁӯгҒ‘гҒҰгғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғғгғҲгӮ’еҪўжҲҗгҒ—зҝ»иЁігҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹгғҶгғігғ—гғ¬гғјгғҲгӮ’еӯҰзҝ’гҖӮ
IterativeDPOгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒDeepSeekV3гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸLLM-as-a-JudgeгҒЁгҖҒMetricX([Paper Note] MetricX-24: The Google Submission to the WMT 2024 Metrics Shared Task, Juraj Juraska+, arXiv'24 )гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰReward ModelгӮ’гҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢеӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҖҒ1гҒӨгҒ®е…ҘеҠӣгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰ100еҖӢгҒ®зҝ»иЁігӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢгҒ®RewardгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гӮ№гӮігӮўгҒ®еҗҲиЁҲеҖӨгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰRejection SamplingгӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§Preference dataгӮ’ж§ӢзҜүгҖӮ3ж®өйҡҺгҒ®DPOгӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒ—гҖҒж®өйҡҺгҒ”гҒЁгҒ«RewardгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гӮ№гӮігӮўгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘPreference DataгҒ«зөһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§жҖ§иғҪеҗ‘дёҠгӮ’е®ҹзҸҫгҖӮ
гғўгғҮгғ«гғһгғјгӮёгҒ§гҒҜDPOгҒ®еҗ„ж®өйҡҺгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’йҮҚгҒҝд»ҳгҒҚгҒ§гғһгғјгӮёгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§еҗ„ж®өйҡҺгҒ§гҒ®й•·жүҖгӮ’зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒҹгҒЁгҒ®гҒ“гҒЁгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Unveiling the Power of Source: Source-based Minimum Bayes Risk Decoding for Neural Machine Translation, Boxuan Lyu+, ACL'25
paper-entry.tags: NeuralNetwork, MachineTranslation, NLP, LanguageModel, ACL, Decoding
paper-entry.issue-body:
# URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.11632 # Authors - Boxuan Lyu - Hidetaka Kamigaito - Kotaro Funakoshi - Manabu Okumura # Abstract - Maximum a posteriori decoding, a commonly used method for neural machine translation (NMT), aims to maximize the estimated posterior probability. However, high estimated probability does not always lead to high translation quality. Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding offers an alternative by seeking hypotheses with the highest expected utility. Inspired by Quality Estimation (QE) reranking which uses the QE model as a ranker we propose source-based MBR (sMBR) decoding, a novel approach that utilizes quasi-sources (generated via paraphrasing or back-translation) as ``support hypotheses'' and a reference-free quality estimation metric as the utility function, marking the first work to solely use sources in MBR decoding. Experiments show that sMBR outperforms QE reranking and the standard MBR decoding. Our findings suggest that sMBR is a promising approach for NMT decoding. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жңҖеӨ§дәӢеҫҢзўәзҺҮгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°пјҲMaximum a posteriori decodingпјүгҒҜгҖҒгғӢгғҘгғјгғ©гғ«ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіпјҲNMTпјүгҒ§дёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒ«дҪҝз”ЁгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢжүӢжі•гҒ§гҖҒжҺЁе®ҡгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹдәӢеҫҢзўәзҺҮгӮ’жңҖеӨ§еҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®зҡ„гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒй«ҳгҒ„жҺЁе®ҡзўәзҺҮгҒҢеҝ…гҒҡгҒ—гӮӮй«ҳгҒ„зҝ»иЁіе“ҒиіӘгҒ«гҒӨгҒӘгҒҢгӮӢгӮҸгҒ‘гҒ§гҒҜгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮжңҖе°ҸгғҷгӮӨгӮәгғӘгӮ№гӮҜпјҲMinimum Bayes Risk, MBRпјүгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒҜгҖҒжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгӮӢеҠ№з”ЁгҒҢжңҖгӮӮй«ҳгҒ„д»®иӘ¬гӮ’жұӮгӮҒгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§д»ЈжӣҝжүӢж®өгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ
е“ҒиіӘжҺЁе®ҡпјҲQuality Estimation, QEпјүгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢеҶҚгғ©гғігӮӯгғігӮ°гҒ«и§ҰзҷәгҒ•гӮҢгҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгӮҪгғјгӮ№гғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®MBRпјҲsource-based MBR, sMBRпјүгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒгғ‘гғ©гғ•гғ¬гғјгӮәгӮ„йҖҶзҝ»иЁігӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰз”ҹжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжә–гӮҪгғјгӮ№пјҲquasi-sourcesпјүгӮ’гҖҢгӮөгғқгғјгғҲд»®иӘ¬гҖҚгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҲ©з”ЁгҒ—гҖҒеҸӮз…§гҒӘгҒ—гҒ®е“ҒиіӘжҺЁе®ҡгғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜгӮ’еҠ№з”Ёй–ўж•°гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰдҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒMBRгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ®гҒҝгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢеҲқгҒ®и©ҰгҒҝгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“гҒ®зөҗжһңгҖҒsMBRгҒҜQEеҶҚгғ©гғігӮӯгғігӮ°гҒҠгӮҲгҒіжЁҷжә–MBRгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢзӨәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®зҷәиҰӢгҒҜгҖҒsMBRгҒҢNMTгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰжңүжңӣгҒӘгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәе”ҶгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гӮҪгғјгӮ№гғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®MBRгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°пјҲsMBRпјүгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒгғ‘гғ©гғ•гғ¬гғјгӮәгӮ„йҖҶзҝ»иЁігҒӢгӮүз”ҹжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжә–гӮҪгғјгӮ№гӮ’гҖҢгӮөгғқгғјгғҲд»®иӘ¬гҖҚгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҲ©з”ЁгҖӮеҸӮз…§гҒӘгҒ—гҒ®е“ҒиіӘжҺЁе®ҡгғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜгӮ’еҠ№з”Ёй–ўж•°гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰз”ЁгҒ„гӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ§гҖҒе®ҹйЁ“гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠsMBRгҒҢQEеҶҚгғ©гғігӮӯгғігӮ°гҒҠгӮҲгҒіжЁҷжә–MBRгӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮsMBRгҒҜNMTгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰжңүжңӣгҒӘжүӢжі•гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] TransEvalnia: Reasoning-based Evaluation and Ranking of Translations, Richard Sproat+, arXiv'25
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, Metrics, NLP, LanguageModel, MultiDimensional
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.12724 # Authors - Richard Sproat - Tianyu Zhao - Llion Jones # Abstract - We present TransEvalnia, a prompting-based translation evaluation and ranking system that uses reasoning in performing its evaluations and ranking. This system presents fine-grained evaluations based on a subset of the Multidimensional Quality Metrics (https://themqm.org/), returns an assessment of which translation it deems the best, and provides numerical scores for the various dimensions and for the overall translation. We show that TransEvalnia performs as well as or better than the state-of-the-art MT-Ranker (Moosa et al. 2024) on our own English-Japanese data as well as several language pairs from various WMT shared tasks. Using Anthropic's Claude-3.5-Sonnet and Qwen-2.5-72B-Instruct as the evaluation LLMs, we show that the evaluations returned are deemed highly acceptable to human raters, and that the scores assigned to the translations by Sonnet, as well as other LLMs, correlate well with scores assigned by the human raters. We also note the sensitivity of our system -- as well as MT-Ranker -- to the order in which the translations are presented, and we propose methods to address this position bias. All data, including the system's evaluation and reasoning, human assessments, as well as code is released. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - з§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҒи©•дҫЎгҒЁгғ©гғігӮӯгғігӮ°гӮ’иЎҢгҒҶйҡӣгҒ«жҺЁи«–гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гӮӢгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®зҝ»иЁіи©•дҫЎгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҖҢTransEvalniaгҖҚгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒҜгҖҒMultidimensional Quality MetricsгҒ®гӮөгғ–гӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҹи©ізҙ°гҒӘи©•дҫЎгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҖҒгҒ©гҒ®зҝ»иЁігҒҢжңҖгӮӮе„ӘгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒЁиҖғгҒҲгӮүгӮҢгӮӢгҒӢгҒ®и©•дҫЎгӮ’иҝ”гҒ—гҖҒгҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘж¬Ўе…ғгҒҠгӮҲгҒіе…ЁдҪ“гҒ®зҝ»иЁігҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢж•°еҖӨгӮ№гӮігӮўгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҒTransEvalniaгҒҢиҮӘгӮүгҒ®иӢұж—ҘгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒҠгӮҲгҒігҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘWMTе…ұжңүгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒӢгӮүгҒ®иӨҮж•°гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгғҡгӮўгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®MT-RankerпјҲMoosa et al. 2024пјүгҒЁеҗҢзӯүгҒҫгҒҹгҒҜгҒқгӮҢд»ҘдёҠгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮи©•дҫЎз”ЁгҒ®LLMгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰAnthropicгҒ®Claude-3.5-SonnetгҒҠгӮҲгҒіQwen-2.5-72B-InstructгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҖҒиҝ”гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹи©•дҫЎгҒҢдәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎиҖ…гҒ«гҒЁгҒЈгҒҰйқһеёёгҒ«еҸ—гҒ‘е…ҘгӮҢгӮүгӮҢгӮӢгӮӮгҒ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒгҒҫгҒҹSonnetгӮ„д»–гҒ®LLMгҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰзҝ»иЁігҒ«д»ҳдёҺгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮ№гӮігӮўгҒҢдәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎиҖ…гҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰд»ҳдёҺгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮ№гӮігӮўгҒЁиүҜеҘҪгҒ«зӣёй–ўгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒЁMT-RankerгҒҢзҝ»иЁігҒ®жҸҗзӨәй ҶеәҸгҒ«ж•Ҹж„ҹгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«гӮӮиЁҖеҸҠгҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®дҪҚзҪ®гғҗгӮӨгӮўгӮ№гҒ«еҜҫеҮҰгҒҷгӮӢж–№жі•гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒЁжҺЁи«–гҖҒдәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҖҒгӮігғјгғүгӮ’еҗ«гӮҖгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒҢе…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®зҝ»иЁіи©•дҫЎгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҖҢTransEvalniaгҖҚгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒMultidimensional Quality MetricsгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸи©ізҙ°гҒӘи©•дҫЎгӮ’иЎҢгҒҶгҖӮTransEvalniaгҒҜгҖҒиӢұж—ҘгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ„WMTгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®MT-RankerгҒЁеҗҢзӯүд»ҘдёҠгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒLLMгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢи©•дҫЎгҒҢдәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎиҖ…гҒЁиүҜеҘҪгҒ«зӣёй–ўгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зўәиӘҚгҖӮзҝ»иЁігҒ®жҸҗзӨәй ҶеәҸгҒ«ж•Ҹж„ҹгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’жҢҮж‘ҳгҒ—гҖҒдҪҚзҪ®гғҗгӮӨгӮўгӮ№гҒёгҒ®еҜҫеҮҰжі•гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҖӮгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®и©•дҫЎгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒҜе…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] xCOMET: Transparent Machine Translation Evaluation through Fine-grained Error Detection, Nuno M. Guerreiro+, TACL'24
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, TACL
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.10482 - anthology: https://aclanthology.org/2024.tacl-1.54/ # Authors - Nuno M. Guerreiro - Ricardo Rei - Daan van Stigt - Luisa Coheur - Pierre Colombo - AndrГ© F. T. Martins # Abstract - Widely used learned metrics for machine translation evaluation, such as COMET and BLEURT, estimate the quality of a translation hypothesis by providing a single sentence-level score. As such, they offer little insight into translation errors (e.g., what are the errors and what is their severity). On the other hand, generative large language models (LLMs) are amplifying the adoption of more granular strategies to evaluation, attempting to detail and categorize translation errors. In this work, we introduce xCOMET, an open-source learned metric designed to bridge the gap between these approaches. xCOMET integrates both sentence-level evaluation and error span detection capabilities, exhibiting state-of-the-art performance across all types of evaluation (sentence-level, system-level, and error span detection). Moreover, it does so while highlighting and categorizing error spans, thus enriching the quality assessment. We also provide a robustness analysis with stress tests, and show that xCOMET is largely capable of identifying localized critical errors and hallucinations. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіи©•дҫЎгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ«еәғгҒҸдҪҝз”ЁгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢеӯҰзҝ’гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜгҖҒдҫӢгҒҲгҒ°COMETгӮ„BLEURTгҒҜгҖҒзҝ»иЁід»®иӘ¬гҒ®е“ҒиіӘгӮ’еҚҳдёҖгҒ®ж–Үгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®гӮ№гӮігӮўгҒ§и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒзҝ»иЁігӮЁгғ©гғјпјҲдҫӢгҒҲгҒ°гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®еҶ…е®№гӮ„гҒқгҒ®ж·ұеҲ»еәҰпјүгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒ®жҙһеҜҹгҒҜгҒ»гҒЁгӮ“гҒ©жҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮдёҖж–№гҒ§гҖҒз”ҹжҲҗеһӢеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲLLMsпјүгҒҜгҖҒзҝ»иЁігӮЁгғ©гғјгӮ’и©ізҙ°гҒ«еҲҶйЎһгҒ—и©•дҫЎгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гӮҲгӮҠзҙ°гҒӢгҒӘжҲҰз•ҘгҒ®жҺЎз”ЁгӮ’дҝғйҖІгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ®гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’еҹӢгӮҒгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«иЁӯиЁҲгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ®еӯҰзҝ’гғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜxCOMETгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮxCOMETгҒҜгҖҒж–Үгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒЁгӮЁгғ©гғјзҜ„еӣІжӨңеҮәж©ҹиғҪгҒ®дёЎж–№гӮ’зөұеҗҲгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®и©•дҫЎгӮҝгӮӨгғ—пјҲж–Үгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҖҒгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гғ¬гғҷгғ«гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјзҜ„еӣІжӨңеҮәпјүгҒ§жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒгӮЁгғ©гғјзҜ„еӣІгӮ’еј·иӘҝгҒ—еҲҶйЎһгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒе“ҒиіӘи©•дҫЎгӮ’иұҠгҒӢгҒ«гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒгӮ№гғҲгғ¬гӮ№гғҶгӮ№гғҲгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹе …зүўжҖ§еҲҶжһҗгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҖҒxCOMETгҒҢеұҖжүҖзҡ„гҒӘйҮҚеӨ§гҒӘгӮЁгғ©гғјгӮ„е№»иҰҡгӮ’зү№е®ҡгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгҒҢй«ҳгҒ„гҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - xCOMETгҒҜгҖҒж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіи©•дҫЎгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ®еӯҰзҝ’гғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜгҒ§гҖҒж–Үгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒЁгӮЁгғ©гғјзҜ„еӣІжӨңеҮәгӮ’зөұеҗҲгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒзҝ»иЁігӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®и©ізҙ°гҒӘеҲҶйЎһгҒЁи©•дҫЎгҒҢеҸҜиғҪгҒЁгҒӘгӮҠгҖҒжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒе …зүўжҖ§еҲҶжһҗгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠйҮҚеӨ§гҒӘгӮЁгғ©гғјгӮ„е№»иҰҡгҒ®зү№е®ҡиғҪеҠӣгҒҢй«ҳгҒ„гҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: How Much Data is Enough Data? Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for In-House Translation: Performance Evaluation Across Multiple Dataset Sizes, Inacio Vieira+, AMTA'24
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, Analysis, NLP, LanguageModel, Supervised-FineTuning (SFT), PEFT(Adaptor/LoRA)
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - preprint: https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.03454 - acl anthology: https://aclanthology.org/2024.amta-research.20/ # Authors - Inacio Vieira - Will Allred - SГ©amus Lankford - Sheila Castilho - Andy Way # Abstract - Decoder-only LLMs have shown impressive performance in MT due to their ability to learn from extensive datasets and generate high-quality translations. However, LLMs often struggle with the nuances and style required for organisation-specific translation. In this study, we explore the effectiveness of fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), particularly Llama 3 8B Instruct, leveraging translation memories (TMs), as a valuable resource to enhance accuracy and efficiency. We investigate the impact of fine-tuning the Llama 3 model using TMs from a specific organisation in the software sector. Our experiments cover five translation directions across languages of varying resource levels (English to Brazilian Portuguese, Czech, German, Finnish, and Korean). We analyse diverse sizes of training datasets (1k to 207k segments) to evaluate their influence on translation quality. We fine-tune separate models for each training set and evaluate their performance based on automatic metrics, BLEU, chrF++, TER, and COMET. Our findings reveal improvement in translation performance with larger datasets across all metrics. On average, BLEU and COMET scores increase by 13 and 25 points, respectively, on the largest training set against the baseline model. Notably, there is a performance deterioration in comparison with the baseline model when fine-tuning on only 1k and 2k examples; however, we observe a substantial improvement as the training dataset size increases. The study highlights the potential of integrating TMs with LLMs to create bespoke translation models tailored to the specific needs of businesses, thus enhancing translation quality and reducing turn-around times. This approach offers a valuable insight for organisations seeking to leverage TMs and LLMs for optimal translation outcomes, especially in narrower domains. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - гғҮгӮігғјгғҖгғје°Ӯз”ЁгҒ®еӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲLLMsпјүгҒҜгҖҒеәғзҜ„гҒӘгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒӢгӮүеӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҖҒй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘзҝ»иЁігӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіпјҲMTпјүгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰеҚ°иұЎзҡ„гҒӘгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒLLMsгҒҜгҖҒзө„з№”зү№жңүгҒ®зҝ»иЁігҒ«еҝ…иҰҒгҒӘгғӢгғҘгӮўгғігӮ№гӮ„гӮ№гӮҝгӮӨгғ«гҒ«иӢҰеҠҙгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгӮҲгҒҸгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒзү№гҒ«Llama 3 8B InstructгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲLLMsпјүгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ®еҠ№жһңгӮ’жҺўжұӮгҒ—гҖҒзҝ»иЁігғЎгғўгғӘпјҲTMsпјүгӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҒҰзІҫеәҰгҒЁеҠ№зҺҮгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢиІҙйҮҚгҒӘгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҲ©з”ЁгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮҪгғ•гғҲгӮҰгӮ§гӮўеҲҶйҮҺгҒ®зү№е®ҡгҒ®зө„з№”гҒӢгӮүгҒ®TMsгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰLlama 3гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒҢдёҺгҒҲгӮӢеҪұйҹҝгӮ’иӘҝжҹ»гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒҢз•°гҒӘгӮӢиЁҖиӘһй–“гҒ§гҒ®5гҒӨгҒ®зҝ»иЁіж–№еҗ‘пјҲиӢұиӘһгҒӢгӮүгғ–гғ©гӮёгғ«гғқгғ«гғҲгӮ¬гғ«иӘһгҖҒгғҒгӮ§гӮіиӘһгҖҒгғүгӮӨгғ„иӘһгҖҒгғ•гӮЈгғігғ©гғігғүиӘһгҖҒйҹ“еӣҪиӘһпјүгӮ’гӮ«гғҗгғјгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ®еӨҡж§ҳгҒӘгӮөгӮӨгӮәпјҲ1kгҒӢгӮү207kгӮ»гӮ°гғЎгғігғҲпјүгӮ’еҲҶжһҗгҒ—гҖҒзҝ»иЁіе“ҒиіӘгҒёгҒ®еҪұйҹҝгӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеҗ„гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰеҲҘгҖ…гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ—гҖҒиҮӘеӢ•и©•дҫЎжҢҮжЁҷпјҲBLEUгҖҒchrF++гҖҒTERгҖҒCOMETпјүгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰгҒқгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮзөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®жҢҮжЁҷгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§зҝ»иЁігғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒҢеҗ‘дёҠгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжңҖеӨ§гҒ®гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒBLEUгҒЁCOMETгҒ®гӮ№гӮігӮўгҒҜгҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢ13гғқгӮӨгғігғҲгҒЁ25гғқгӮӨгғігғҲеҗ‘дёҠгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒ1kгҒҠгӮҲгҒі2kгҒ®дҫӢгҒ®гҒҝгҒ§гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’иЎҢгҒЈгҒҹе ҙеҗҲгҖҒгғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁжҜ”ијғгҒ—гҒҰгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒҢдҪҺдёӢгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢиҰӢгӮүгӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ®гӮөгӮӨгӮәгҒҢеў—еҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҒӨгӮҢгҒҰеӨ§е№…гҒӘж”№е–„гҒҢиҰіеҜҹгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒҜгҖҒLLMsгҒЁTMsгӮ’зөұеҗҲгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒдјҒжҘӯгҒ®зү№е®ҡгҒ®гғӢгғјгӮәгҒ«еҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒҹгӮ«гӮ№гӮҝгғһгӮӨгӮәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹзҝ»иЁігғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гӮ’еј·иӘҝгҒ—гҖҒзҝ»иЁіе“ҒиіӘгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгҖҒгӮҝгғјгғігӮўгғ©гӮҰгғігғүгӮҝгӮӨгғ гӮ’зҹӯзё®гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜгҖҒзү№гҒ«зӢӯгҒ„гғүгғЎгӮӨгғігҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒжңҖйҒ©гҒӘзҝ»иЁізөҗжһңгӮ’еҫ—гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«TMsгҒЁLLMsгӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гӮҲгҒҶгҒЁгҒҷгӮӢзө„з№”гҒ«гҒЁгҒЈгҒҰиІҙйҮҚгҒӘжҙһеҜҹгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - LLMsгҒ®гғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ«зҝ»иЁігғЎгғўгғӘпјҲTMsпјүгӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҖҒзү№е®ҡгҒ®зө„з№”еҗ‘гҒ‘гҒ®зҝ»иЁізІҫеәҰгҒЁеҠ№зҺҮгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢз ”з©¶гҖӮ5гҒӨгҒ®зҝ»иЁіж–№еҗ‘гҒ§з•°гҒӘгӮӢгӮөгӮӨгӮәгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰе®ҹйЁ“гҒ—гҖҒгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒҢеў—гҒҲгӮӢгҒ»гҒ©зҝ»иЁігғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒҢеҗ‘дёҠгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зўәиӘҚгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒ1kгҒҠгӮҲгҒі2kгҒ®дҫӢгҒ§гҒҜгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒҢдҪҺдёӢгҒҷгӮӢгҒҢгҖҒгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ®гӮөгӮӨгӮәгҒҢеў—еҠ гҒҷгӮӢгҒ«гҒӨгӮҢгҒҰж”№е–„гҒҢиҰӢгӮүгӮҢгӮӢгҖӮLLMsгҒЁTMsгҒ®зөұеҗҲгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒдјҒжҘӯзү№жңүгҒ®гғӢгғјгӮәгҒ«еҝңгҒҳгҒҹгӮ«гӮ№гӮҝгғһгӮӨгӮәзҝ»иЁігғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®еҸҜиғҪжҖ§гӮ’зӨәе”ҶгҖӮ

maintainer-comment-text.p: QLoRAгҒ§Llama 8B InstructгӮ’MTгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ§SFTгҒ—гҒҹе ҙеҗҲгҒ®гӮөгғігғ—гғ«ж•°гҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгҒ®еӨүеҢ–гӮ’жӨңиЁјгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮгҒҹгҒ гҒ—гҖҒжӨңиЁјгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒҜMTгҖҒQLoRAгҒ§SFTгӮ’е®ҹж–ҪгҒ—rankгҒҜ64гҖҒеӯҰзҝ’жҷӮгҒ®гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгҒҜйқһеёёгҒ«гӮ·гғігғ—гғ«гҒӘгӮӮгҒ®гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒе№…еәғгҒ„иЁӯе®ҡгҒ§еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҸгҒ‘гҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒ„гҒ®гҒ§гҖҒгҒ“гҒ“гҒ§еҫ—гӮүгӮҢгҒҹзҹҘиҰӢгҒҢе№…еәғгҒҸйҒ©з”ЁеҸҜиғҪгҒӘгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜзӨәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҒ§гҒӮгӮҚгҒҶзӮ№гҖҒгҒ«гҒҜжіЁж„ҸгҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒ гҒЁжҖқгӮҸгӮҢгӮӢгҖӮ гҒ“гҒ®иЁӯе®ҡгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒSFTгҒ§еҲ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгӮөгғігғ—гғ«ж•°гҒҢеў—гҒҲгӮҢгҒ°еў—гҒҲгӮӢгҒ»гҒ©жҖ§иғҪгҒҢдёҠгҒҢгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«иҰӢгҒҲгӮӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: Prompting Large Language Model for Machine Translation: A Case Study, Biao Zhang+, arXiv'23
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, NLP, LanguageModel
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.07069 # Authors - Biao Zhang - Barry Haddow - Alexandra Birch # Abstract - Research on prompting has shown excellent performance with little or even no supervised training across many tasks. However, prompting for machine translation is still under-explored in the literature. We fill this gap by offering a systematic study on prompting strategies for translation, examining various factors for prompt template and demonstration example selection. We further explore the use of monolingual data and the feasibility of cross-lingual, cross-domain, and sentence-to-document transfer learning in prompting. Extensive experiments with GLM-130B (Zeng et al., 2022) as the testbed show that 1) the number and the quality of prompt examples matter, where using suboptimal examples degenerates translation; 2) several features of prompt examples, such as semantic similarity, show significant Spearman correlation with their prompting performance; yet, none of the correlations are strong enough; 3) using pseudo parallel prompt examples constructed from monolingual data via zero-shot prompting could improve translation; and 4) improved performance is achievable by transferring knowledge from prompt examples selected in other settings. We finally provide an analysis on the model outputs and discuss several problems that prompting still suffers from. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢз ”з©¶гҒҜгҖҒеӨҡгҒҸгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҒ»гҒЁгӮ“гҒ©гҒҫгҒҹгҒҜе…ЁгҒҸзӣЈиҰ–гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒӘгҒ—гҒ§е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒҜгҖҒж–ҮзҢ®гҒ®дёӯгҒ§гҒҫгҒ еҚҒеҲҶгҒ«жҺўжұӮгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’еҹӢгӮҒгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒзҝ»иЁігҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°жҲҰз•ҘгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢдҪ“зі»зҡ„гҒӘз ”з©¶гӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҖҒгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҶгғігғ—гғ¬гғјгғҲгӮ„гғҮгғўгғігӮ№гғҲгғ¬гғјгӮ·гғ§гғідҫӢгҒ®йҒёжҠһгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢгҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘиҰҒеӣ гӮ’жӨңиЁҺгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒеҚҳиЁҖиӘһгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ®дҪҝз”ЁгӮ„гҖҒгӮҜгғӯгӮ№гғӘгғігӮ¬гғ«гҖҒгӮҜгғӯгӮ№гғүгғЎгӮӨгғігҖҒж–ҮгҒӢгӮүж–ҮжӣёгҒёгҒ®и»ўз§»еӯҰзҝ’гҒ®е®ҹзҸҫеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮжҺўгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮGLM-130BпјҲZeng et al., 2022пјүгӮ’гғҶгӮ№гғҲгғҷгғғгғүгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰз”ЁгҒ„гҒҹеәғзҜ„гҒӘе®ҹйЁ“гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒ1) гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲдҫӢгҒ®ж•°гҒЁиіӘгҒҢйҮҚиҰҒгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒжңҖйҒ©гҒ§гҒӘгҒ„дҫӢгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒЁзҝ»иЁігҒҢеҠЈеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒ2) гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲдҫӢгҒ®гҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒ®зү№еҫҙпјҲж„Ҹе‘ізҡ„йЎһдјјжҖ§гҒӘгҒ©пјүгҒҢгҒқгҒ®гғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒЁжңүж„ҸгҒӘгӮ№гғ”гӮўгғһгғізӣёй–ўгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒгҒ„гҒҡгӮҢгҒ®зӣёй–ўгӮӮеҚҒеҲҶгҒ«еј·гҒҸгҒӘгҒ„гҒ“гҒЁгҖҒ3) гӮјгғӯгӮ·гғ§гғғгғҲгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰеҚҳиЁҖиӘһгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒӢгӮүж§ӢзҜүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹж“¬дјје№іиЎҢгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲдҫӢгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§зҝ»иЁігҒҢж”№е–„гҒ•гӮҢгӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒ4) д»–гҒ®иЁӯе®ҡгҒ§йҒёжҠһгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲдҫӢгҒӢгӮүгҒ®зҹҘиӯҳгӮ’и»ўйҖҒгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒ®еҗ‘дёҠгҒҢйҒ”жҲҗеҸҜиғҪгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮжңҖеҫҢгҒ«гҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®еҮәеҠӣгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢеҲҶжһҗгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҖҒгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒҢдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰзӣҙйқўгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰиӯ°и«–гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ®з ”з©¶гӮ’дҪ“зі»зҡ„гҒ«иЎҢгҒ„гҖҒгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҶгғігғ—гғ¬гғјгғҲгӮ„гғҮгғўдҫӢгҒ®йҒёжҠһгҒ«еҪұйҹҝгӮ’дёҺгҒҲгӮӢиҰҒеӣ гӮ’жӨңиЁҺгҖӮGLM-130BгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹе®ҹйЁ“гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲдҫӢгҒ®ж•°гҒЁиіӘгҒҢзҝ»иЁігҒ«йҮҚиҰҒгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒж„Ҹе‘ізҡ„йЎһдјјжҖ§гҒӘгҒ©гҒ®зү№еҫҙгҒҢгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒЁзӣёй–ўгҒҷгӮӢгҒҢеј·гҒҸгҒӘгҒ„гҒ“гҒЁгҖҒеҚҳиЁҖиӘһгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒӢгӮүгҒ®ж“¬дјје№іиЎҢгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲдҫӢгҒҢзҝ»иЁігӮ’ж”№е–„гҒҷгӮӢеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҖҒд»–гҒ®иЁӯе®ҡгҒӢгӮүгҒ®зҹҘиӯҳи»ўйҖҒгҒҢгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№еҗ‘дёҠгҒ«еҜ„дёҺгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҶгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ®иӘІйЎҢгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮиӯ°и«–гҖӮ

maintainer-comment-text.p: zero-shotгҒ§MTгӮ’иЎҢгҒҶгҒЁгҒҚгҒ«гҖҒж”№иЎҢгҒ®жңүз„ЎгӮ„гҖҒе°‘гҒ—гҒ®promptingгҒ®йҒ•гҒ„гҒ§COMETгӮ№гӮігӮўгҒҢеӨ§е№…гҒ«еӨүгӮҸгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜGLM-130BгӮ’INT4гҒ§йҮҸеӯҗеҢ–гҒ—гҒҹгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§е®ҹйЁ“гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ иҲҲе‘іж·ұгҒ„гҒҢгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®зҹҘиҰӢгӮ’дёҖиҲ¬еҢ–гҒ—гҒҰе…ЁгҒҰгҒ®LLMгҒ«йҒ©з”ЁгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгҒӢпјҹгҒЁиЁҖгӮҸгӮҢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒгҒқгҒҶгҒҜгҒӘгӮүгҒӘгҒ„ж°—гҒҢгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮд»–гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§жӨңиЁјгҒ—гҒҹгӮүеӮҫеҗ‘гҒҜгҒҠгҒқгӮүгҒҸеӨүгӮҸгӮӢгҒ§гҒӮгӮҚгҒҶпјҲгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶж„Ҹе‘ігҒ§гҒҠгҒқгӮүгҒҸи«–ж–ҮгҒ®гӮҝгӮӨгғҲгғ«гҒ«гӮӮCase StudyгҒЁиЁҳиҝ°гҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ®гҒӢгҒӘгҒӮпјүгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: DiscoScore: Evaluating Text Generation with BERT and Discourse Coherence, Wei Zhao+, N_A, EACL'23
paper-entry.tags: DocumentSummarization, MachineTranslation, NaturalLanguageGeneration, Metrics, NLP, Evaluation, LM-based, Coherence
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11176 # Affiliations - Wei Zhao, N/A - Michael Strube, N/A - Steffen Eger, N/A # Abstract - Recently, there has been a growing interest in designing text generationsystems from a discourse coherence perspective, e.g., modeling theinterdependence between sentences. Still, recent BERT-based evaluation metricsare weak in recognizing coherence, and thus are not reliable in a way to spotthe discourse-level improvements of those text generation systems. In thiswork, we introduce DiscoScore, a parametrized discourse metric, which uses BERTto model discourse coherence from different perspectives, driven by Centeringtheory. Our experiments encompass 16 non-discourse and discourse metrics,including DiscoScore and popular coherence models, evaluated on summarizationand document-level machine translation (MT). We find that (i) the majority ofBERT-based metrics correlate much worse with human rated coherence than earlydiscourse metrics, invented a decade ago; (ii) the recent state-of-the-artBARTScore is weak when operated at system level -- which is particularlyproblematic as systems are typically compared in this manner. DiscoScore, incontrast, achieves strong system-level correlation with human ratings, not onlyin coherence but also in factual consistency and other aspects, and surpassesBARTScore by over 10 correlation points on average. Further, aiming tounderstand DiscoScore, we provide justifications to the importance of discoursecoherence for evaluation metrics, and explain the superiority of one variantover another. Our code is available at\url{https://github.com/AIPHES/DiscoScore}. # Translation (by gpt-3.5-turbo) - жңҖиҝ‘гҖҒж–Үз« гҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ®иҰізӮ№гҒӢгӮүгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲз”ҹжҲҗгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гӮ’иЁӯиЁҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«й–ўеҝғгҒҢй«ҳгҒҫгҒЈгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮдҫӢгҒҲгҒ°гҖҒж–Үй–“гҒ®зӣёдә’дҫқеӯҳй–ўдҝӮгӮ’гғўгғҮгғ«еҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒжңҖиҝ‘гҒ®BERTгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®и©•дҫЎжҢҮжЁҷгҒҜдёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’иӘҚиӯҳгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгҒҢејұгҒҸгҖҒгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲз”ҹжҲҗгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®и«Үи©ұгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®ж”№е–„гӮ’иҰӢгҒӨгҒ‘гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҒҜдҝЎй јжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒCenteringзҗҶи«–гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒз•°гҒӘгӮӢиҰ–зӮ№гҒӢгӮүи«Үи©ұгҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’гғўгғҮгғ«еҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«BERTгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝеҢ–гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹи«Үи©ұжҢҮжЁҷгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢDiscoScoreгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®е®ҹйЁ“гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒDiscoScoreгҒЁдәәж°—гҒ®гҒӮгӮӢдёҖиІ«жҖ§гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’еҗ«гӮҖ16гҒ®йқһи«Үи©ұгҒҠгӮҲгҒіи«Үи©ұжҢҮжЁҷгӮ’иҰҒзҙ„гҒЁж–Үжӣёгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁіпјҲMTпјүгҒ§и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒқгҒ®зөҗжһңгҖҒ(i) BERTгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®жҢҮжЁҷгҒ®еӨ§йғЁеҲҶгҒҜгҖҒ10е№ҙеүҚгҒ«й–ӢзҷәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹеҲқжңҹгҒ®и«Үи©ұжҢҮжЁҷгӮҲгӮҠгӮӮдәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒЁгҒ®зӣёй–ўгҒҢгҒҜгӮӢгҒӢгҒ«жӮӘгҒ„гҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгӮҸгҒӢгӮҠгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ(ii) жңҖиҝ‘гҒ®жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®BARTScoreгҒҜгҖҒгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ§гҒ®ж“ҚдҪңжҷӮгҒ«ејұгҒ„зөҗжһңгҒЁгҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒйҖҡеёёгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ еҗҢеЈ«гӮ’жҜ”ијғгҒҷгӮӢйҡӣгҒ«зү№гҒ«е•ҸйЎҢгҒЁгҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮдёҖж–№гҖҒDiscoScoreгҒҜгҖҒдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ гҒ‘гҒ§гҒӘгҒҸдәӢе®ҹгҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ„гҒқгҒ®д»–гҒ®еҒҙйқўгҒ§гӮӮгҖҒгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ§дәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒЁеј·гҒ„зӣёй–ўгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒе№іеқҮгҒ§BARTScoreгӮ’10д»ҘдёҠдёҠеӣһгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒDiscoScoreгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒжҖ§гӮ’зҗҶи§ЈгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒи©•дҫЎжҢҮжЁҷгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢи«Үи©ұгҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ®йҮҚиҰҒжҖ§гҒЁгҖҒгҒӮгӮӢгғҗгғӘгӮўгғігғҲгҒҢд»–гҒ®гғҗгғӘгӮўгғігғҲгӮҲгӮҠгӮӮе„ӘгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢзҗҶз”ұгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰиӘ¬жҳҺгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮігғјгғүгҒҜ\url{https://github.com/AIPHES/DiscoScore}гҒ§е…ҘжүӢеҸҜиғҪгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-3.5-turbo) - жң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒж–Үз« гҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„жҢҮжЁҷгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢDiscoScoreгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮDiscoScoreгҒҜCenteringзҗҶи«–гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒ„гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒBERTгӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰи«Үи©ұгҒ®дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’гғўгғҮгғ«еҢ–гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“гҒ®зөҗжһңгҖҒDiscoScoreгҒҜд»–гҒ®жҢҮжЁҷгӮҲгӮҠгӮӮдәәй–“гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒЁгҒ®зӣёй–ўгҒҢй«ҳгҒҸгҖҒгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ§гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒ§гӮӮе„ӘгӮҢгҒҹзөҗжһңгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒDiscoScoreгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒжҖ§гҒЁгҒқгҒ®е„ӘдҪҚжҖ§гҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮиӘ¬жҳҺгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: Simple and Effective Unsupervised Speech Translation, ACL'23

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Frustratingly Easy Label Projection for Cross-lingual Transfer, Yang Chen+, ACL'23, 2022.11
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, NLP, LanguageModel, action_wanted, Annotation, TransferLearning, MultiLingual, ACL
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.15613 # Authors - Yang Chen - Chao Jiang - Alan Ritter - Wei Xu # Abstract - Translating training data into many languages has emerged as a practical solution for improving cross-lingual transfer. For tasks that involve span-level annotations, such as information extraction or question answering, an additional label projection step is required to map annotated spans onto the translated texts. Recently, a few efforts have utilized a simple mark-then-translate method to jointly perform translation and projection by inserting special markers around the labeled spans in the original sentence. However, as far as we are aware, no empirical analysis has been conducted on how this approach compares to traditional annotation projection based on word alignment. In this paper, we present an extensive empirical study across 57 languages and three tasks (QA, NER, and Event Extraction) to evaluate the effectiveness and limitations of both methods, filling an important gap in the literature. Experimental results show that our optimized version of mark-then-translate, which we call EasyProject, is easily applied to many languages and works surprisingly well, outperforming the more complex word alignment-based methods. We analyze several key factors that affect the end-task performance, and show EasyProject works well because it can accurately preserve label span boundaries after translation. We will publicly release all our code and data. # Translation (by gpt-5-nano) - еӯҰзҝ’гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’еӨҡж•°гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒёзҝ»иЁігҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜгҖҒгӮҜгғӯгӮ№гғӘгғігӮ¬гғ«и»ўйҖҒгӮ’ж”№е–„гҒҷгӮӢе®ҹз”Ёзҡ„гҒӘи§Јжұәзӯ–гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰжө®дёҠгҒ—гҒҰгҒҚгҒҹгҖӮжғ…е ұжҠҪеҮәгӮ„иіӘе•Ҹеҝңзӯ”гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘгӮ№гғ‘гғігғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ®жіЁйҮҲгӮ’еҗ«гӮҖгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒзҝ»иЁіеҫҢгҒ®гғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒёжіЁйҮҲгӮ№гғ‘гғігӮ’еҜҫеҝңгҒҘгҒ‘гӮӢиҝҪеҠ гҒ®гғ©гғҷгғ«жҠ•еҪұгӮ№гғҶгғғгғ—гҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮжңҖиҝ‘гҖҒе…ғгҒ®ж–ҮгҒ®гғ©гғҷгғ«д»ҳгҒҚгӮ№гғ‘гғігҒ®е‘ЁеӣІгҒ«зү№еҲҘгҒӘгғһгғјгӮ«гғјгӮ’жҢҝе…ҘгҒ—гҒҰзҝ»иЁігҒЁжҠ•еҪұгӮ’еҗҢжҷӮгҒ«иЎҢгҒҶгҖҒеҚҳзҙ”гҒӘгғһгғјгӮҜгғ»гӮўгғігғүгғ»гғҲгғ©гғігӮ№гғ¬гғјгғҲжі•гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹеҸ–гӮҠзө„гҒҝгҒҢгҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒӮгӮӢгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒжҲ‘гҖ…гҒҢзҹҘгӮӢйҷҗгӮҠгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҢеҫ“жқҘгҒ®еҚҳиӘһгӮўгғ©гӮӨгғЎгғігғҲгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸжіЁйҮҲжҠ•еҪұгҒЁжҜ”ијғгҒ—гҒҰгҒ©гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«ж©ҹиғҪгҒҷгӮӢгҒӢгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒ®е®ҹиЁјеҲҶжһҗгҒҜиЎҢгӮҸгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒӘгҒ„гҖӮжң¬и«–ж–ҮгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒ57иЁҖиӘһгҒЁ3гҒӨгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜпјҲQAгҖҒNERгҖҒгӮӨгғҷгғігғҲжҠҪеҮәпјүгҒ«гӮҸгҒҹгӮӢеәғзҜ„гҒӘе®ҹиЁјз ”з©¶гӮ’жҸҗзӨәгҒ—гҖҒдёЎжүӢжі•гҒ®жңүеҠ№жҖ§гҒЁйҷҗз•ҢгӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҰж–ҮзҢ®гҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’еҹӢгӮҒгӮӢгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒEasyProjectгҒЁе‘јгҒ¶з§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гғһгғјгӮҜгғ»гӮўгғігғүгғ»гғҲгғ©гғігӮ№гғ¬гғјгғҲгҒ®жңҖйҒ©еҢ–зүҲгҒҢеӨҡиЁҖиӘһгҒёе®№жҳ“гҒ«йҒ©з”ЁгҒ§гҒҚгҖҒж„ҸеӨ–гҒ«гӮӮйқһеёёгҒ«иүҜеҘҪгҒ«ж©ҹиғҪгҒ—гҖҒгӮҲгӮҠиӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘеҚҳиӘһгӮўгғ©гӮӨгғЎгғігғҲгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®жүӢжі•гӮ’еҮҢй§•гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮжҲ‘гҖ…гҒҜгҖҒдёӢжөҒгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгҒ«еҪұйҹҝгӮ’дёҺгҒҲгӮӢгҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒ®йҚөгҒЁгҒӘгӮӢиҰҒеӣ гӮ’еҲҶжһҗгҒ—гҖҒзҝ»иЁіеҫҢгҒ«гӮӮгғ©гғҷгғ«гӮ№гғ‘гғігҒ®еўғз•ҢгӮ’жӯЈзўәгҒ«дҝқжҢҒгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«EasyProjectгҒҢж©ҹиғҪгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҖӮгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®гӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’е…¬й–ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - еӨҡиЁҖиӘһгҒёгҒ®гғ©гғҷгғ«жҠ•еҪұгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгғһгғјгӮҜгғ»гӮўгғігғүгғ»гғҲгғ©гғігӮ№гғ¬гғјгғҲжі•гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҢжҸҗжЎҲгҒ•гӮҢгҖҒ57иЁҖиӘһгҒЁ3гҒӨгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢе®ҹиЁјз ”з©¶гҒҢиЎҢгӮҸгӮҢгҒҹгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒEasyProjectгҒҢеҚҳиӘһгӮўгғ©гӮӨгғЎгғігғҲжҠҖиЎ“гӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒзҝ»иЁіеҫҢгӮӮгғ©гғҷгғ«гӮ№гғ‘гғігҒ®еўғз•ҢгӮ’дҝқжҢҒгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’жҳҺгӮүгҒӢгҒ«гҒ—гҒҹгҖӮе…ЁгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒҜе…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] No Language Left Behind: Scaling Human-Centered Machine Translation, NLLB Team+, arXiv'22
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.04672 # Authors - NLLB Team - Marta R. Costa-jussГ - James Cross - Onur ГҮelebi - Maha Elbayad - Kenneth Heafield - Kevin Heffernan - Elahe Kalbassi - Janice Lam - Daniel Licht - Jean Maillard - Anna Sun - Skyler Wang - Guillaume Wenzek - Al Youngblood - Bapi Akula - Loic Barrault - Gabriel Mejia Gonzalez - Prangthip Hansanti - John Hoffman - Semarley Jarrett - Kaushik Ram Sadagopan - Dirk Rowe - Shannon Spruit - Chau Tran - Pierre Andrews - Necip Fazil Ayan - Shruti Bhosale - Sergey Edunov - Angela Fan - Cynthia Gao - Vedanuj Goswami - Francisco GuzmГЎn - Philipp Koehn - Alexandre Mourachko - Christophe Ropers - Safiyyah Saleem - Holger Schwenk - Jeff Wang # Abstract - Driven by the goal of eradicating language barriers on a global scale, machine translation has solidified itself as a key focus of artificial intelligence research today. However, such efforts have coalesced around a small subset of languages, leaving behind the vast majority of mostly low-resource languages. What does it take to break the 200 language barrier while ensuring safe, high quality results, all while keeping ethical considerations in mind? In No Language Left Behind, we took on this challenge by first contextualizing the need for low-resource language translation support through exploratory interviews with native speakers. Then, we created datasets and models aimed at narrowing the performance gap between low and high-resource languages. More specifically, we developed a conditional compute model based on Sparsely Gated Mixture of Experts that is trained on data obtained with novel and effective data mining techniques tailored for low-resource languages. We propose multiple architectural and training improvements to counteract overfitting while training on thousands of tasks. Critically, we evaluated the performance of over 40,000 different translation directions using a human-translated benchmark, Flores-200, and combined human evaluation with a novel toxicity benchmark covering all languages in Flores-200 to assess translation safety. Our model achieves an improvement of 44% BLEU relative to the previous state-of-the-art, laying important groundwork towards realizing a universal translation system. Finally, we open source all contributions described in this work, accessible at https://github.com/facebookresearch/fairseq/tree/nllb. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еЈҒгӮ’дё–з•ҢиҰҸжЁЎгҒ§жҺ’йҷӨгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®жҢҮгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒҜд»Ҡж—ҘгҒ®дәәе·ҘзҹҘиғҪз ”з©¶гҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘз„ҰзӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰзўәз«ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒгҒқгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘеҠӘеҠӣгҒҜе°‘ж•°гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«йӣҶдёӯгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒдё»гҒ«гғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еӨ§еӨҡж•°гҒҜеҸ–гӮҠж®ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ200гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еЈҒгӮ’жү“з ҙгҒ—гҖҒе®үе…ЁгҒ§й«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘзөҗжһңгӮ’зўәдҝқгҒ—гҒӨгҒӨгҖҒеҖ«зҗҶзҡ„гҒӘй…Қж…®гӮ’еҝҳгӮҢгҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҒҜдҪ•гҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒӘгҒ®гҒӢпјҹгҖҢNo Language Left BehindгҖҚгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгҒҫгҒҡжҜҚеӣҪиӘһи©ұиҖ…гҒЁгҒ®жҺўзҙўзҡ„гӮӨгғігӮҝгғ“гғҘгғјгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ®зҝ»иЁіж”ҜжҸҙгҒ®еҝ…иҰҒжҖ§гӮ’ж–Үи„ҲеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒӢгӮүгҒ“гҒ®иӘІйЎҢгҒ«еҸ–гӮҠзө„гӮ“гҒ гҖӮж¬ЎгҒ«гҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒЁиұҠеҜҢгҒӘиЁҖиӘһгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’зё®е°ҸгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®зҡ„гҒЁгҒ—гҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹж–°гҒ—гҒ„еҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒӘгғҮгғјгӮҝгғһгӮӨгғӢгғігӮ°жҠҖиЎ“гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰеҸ–еҫ—гҒ—гҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ§иЁ“з·ҙгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгҖҒгӮ№гғ‘гғјгӮ№гӮІгғјгғҶгғғгғүгғҹгӮҜгӮ№гғҒгғЈгғјгӮӘгғ–гӮЁгӮӯгӮ№гғ‘гғјгғ„гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸжқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒҚиЁҲз®—гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’й–ӢзҷәгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮж•°еҚғгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§гҒ®иЁ“з·ҙдёӯгҒ«йҒҺеӯҰзҝ’гӮ’йҳІгҒҗгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®иӨҮж•°гҒ®гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒҠгӮҲгҒіиЁ“з·ҙгҒ®ж”№е–„гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«гҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜдәәй–“зҝ»иЁігҒ®гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢFlores-200гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒ40,000д»ҘдёҠгҒ®з•°гҒӘгӮӢзҝ»иЁіж–№еҗ‘гҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҖҒFlores-200гҒ®гҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®иЁҖиӘһгӮ’гӮ«гғҗгғјгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„жҜ’жҖ§гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒЁдәәй–“и©•дҫЎгӮ’зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒҰзҝ»иЁігҒ®е®үе…ЁжҖ§гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒеҫ“жқҘгҒ®жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜжҠҖиЎ“гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰ44%гҒ®BLEUгҒ®ж”№е–„гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒжҷ®йҒҚзҡ„гҒӘзҝ»иЁігӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®е®ҹзҸҫгҒ«еҗ‘гҒ‘гҒҹйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘеҹәзӣӨгӮ’зҜүгҒ„гҒҹгҖӮжңҖеҫҢгҒ«гҖҒжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§иҝ°гҒ№гҒҹгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®иІўзҢ®гӮ’гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе…¬й–ӢгҒ—гҖҒhttps://github.com/facebookresearch/fairseq/tree/nllb гҒӢгӮүгӮўгӮҜгӮ»гӮ№еҸҜиғҪгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гҖҢNo Language Left BehindгҖҚгғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒҜгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ®ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігӮ’ж”№е–„гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒжҜҚеӣҪиӘһи©ұиҖ…гҒЁгҒ®гӮӨгғігӮҝгғ“гғҘгғјгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгғӢгғјгӮәгӮ’зү№е®ҡгҒ—гҖҒгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’й–ӢзҷәгҖӮж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғҮгғјгӮҝгғһгӮӨгғӢгғігӮ°жҠҖиЎ“гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹжқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒҚиЁҲз®—гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’ж§ӢзҜүгҒ—гҖҒйҒҺеӯҰзҝ’гӮ’йҳІгҒҗгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®иЁ“з·ҙж”№е–„гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҖӮFlores-200гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒеҫ“жқҘжҠҖиЎ“гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰ44%гҒ®BLEUж”№е–„гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒжҷ®йҒҚзҡ„гҒӘзҝ»иЁігӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®еҹәзӣӨгӮ’зҜүгҒ„гҒҹгҖӮе…ЁгҒҰгҒ®жҲҗжһңгҒҜгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ§е…¬й–ӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] CometKiwi: IST-Unbabel 2022 Submission for the Quality Estimation Shared Task, Rei+, WMT'22
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation
paper-entry.issue-body:
### URL https://aclanthology.org/2022.wmt-1.60/
### Authors Ricardo Rei, Marcos Treviso, Nuno M. Guerreiro, Chrysoula Zerva, Ana C Farinha, Christine Maroti, JosГ© G. C. de Souza, Taisiya Glushkova, Duarte Alves, Luisa Coheur, Alon Lavie, AndrГ© F. T. Martins
### Abstract We present the joint contribution of IST and Unbabel to the WMT 2022 Shared Task on Quality Estimation (QE). Our team participated in all three subtasks: (i) Sentence and Word-level Quality Prediction; (ii) Explainable QE; and (iii) Critical Error Detection. For all tasks we build on top of the COMET framework, connecting it with the predictor-estimator architecture of OpenKiwi, and equipping it with a word-level sequence tagger and an explanation extractor. Our results suggest that incorporating references during pretraining improves performance across several language pairs on downstream tasks, and that jointly training with sentence and word-level objectives yields a further boost. Furthermore, combining attention and gradient information proved to be the top strategy for extracting good explanations of sentence-level QE models. Overall, our submissions achieved the best results for all three tasks for almost all language pairs by a considerable margin.

paper-entry.title: No Language Left Behind: Scaling Human-Centered Machine Translation, NLLB Team+, N_A, arXiv'22
paper-entry.tags: MachineTranslation, NLP, Dataset
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.04672 # Affiliations - NLLB Team, N/A - Marta R. Costa-jussГ , N/A - James Cross, N/A - Onur ГҮelebi, N/A - Maha Elbayad, N/A - Kenneth Heafield, N/A - Kevin Heffernan, N/A - Elahe Kalbassi, N/A - Janice Lam, N/A - Daniel Licht, N/A - Jean Maillard, N/A - Anna Sun, N/A - Skyler Wang, N/A - Guillaume Wenzek, N/A - Al Youngblood, N/A - Bapi Akula, N/A - Loic Barrault, N/A - Gabriel Mejia Gonzalez, N/A - Prangthip Hansanti, N/A - John Hoffman, N/A - Semarley Jarrett, N/A - Kaushik Ram Sadagopan, N/A - Dirk Rowe, N/A - Shannon Spruit, N/A - Chau Tran, N/A - Pierre Andrews, N/A - Necip Fazil Ayan, N/A - Shruti Bhosale, N/A - Sergey Edunov, N/A - Angela Fan, N/A - Cynthia Gao, N/A - Vedanuj Goswami, N/A - Francisco GuzmГЎn, N/A - Philipp Koehn, N/A - Alexandre Mourachko, N/A - Christophe Ropers, N/A - Safiyyah Saleem, N/A - Holger Schwenk, N/A - Jeff Wang, N/A # Abstract - Driven by the goal of eradicating language barriers on a global scale, machine translation has solidified itself as a key focus of artificial intelligence research today. However, such efforts have coalesced around a small subset of languages, leaving behind the vast majority of mostly low-resource languages. What does it take to break the 200 language barrier while ensuring safe, high quality results, all while keeping ethical considerations in mind? In No Language Left Behind, we took on this challenge by first contextualizing the need for low-resource language translation support through exploratory interviews with native speakers. Then, we created datasets and models aimed at narrowing the performance gap between low and high-resource languages. More specifically, we developed a conditional compute model based on Sparsely Gated Mixture of Experts that is trained on data obtained with novel and effective data mining techniques tailored for low-resource languages. We propose multiple architectural and training improvements to counteract overfitting while training on thousands of tasks. Critically, we evaluated the performance of over 40,000 different translation directions using a human-translated benchmark, Flores-200, and combined human evaluation with a novel toxicity benchmark covering all languages in Flores-200 to assess translation safety. Our model achieves an improvement of 44% BLEU relative to the previous state-of-the-art, laying important groundwork towards realizing a universal translation system. Finally, we open source all contributions described in this work, accessible at https://github.com/facebookresearch/fairseq/tree/nllb. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еЈҒгӮ’дё–з•ҢиҰҸжЁЎгҒ§жҺ’йҷӨгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®жҢҮгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігҒҜд»Ҡж—ҘгҒ®дәәе·ҘзҹҘиғҪз ”з©¶гҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘз„ҰзӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰзўәз«ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒгҒқгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘеҠӘеҠӣгҒҜе°‘ж•°гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ«йӣҶдёӯгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒдё»гҒ«гғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еӨ§еӨҡж•°гҒҜеҸ–гӮҠж®ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҖӮ200гҒ®иЁҖиӘһгҒ®еЈҒгӮ’жү“з ҙгҒ—гҖҒе®үе…ЁгҒ§й«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘзөҗжһңгӮ’зўәдҝқгҒ—гҒӨгҒӨгҖҒеҖ«зҗҶзҡ„гҒӘй…Қж…®гӮ’еҝҳгӮҢгҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҒҜдҪ•гҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒӘгҒ®гҒӢпјҹгҖҢNo Language Left BehindгҖҚгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгҒҫгҒҡгғҚгӮӨгғҶгӮЈгғ–гӮ№гғ”гғјгӮ«гғјгҒЁгҒ®жҺўзҙўзҡ„гӮӨгғігӮҝгғ“гғҘгғјгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ®зҝ»иЁіж”ҜжҸҙгҒ®еҝ…иҰҒжҖ§гӮ’ж–Үи„ҲеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒӢгӮүгҒ“гҒ®иӘІйЎҢгҒ«еҸ–гӮҠзө„гӮ“гҒ гҖӮж¬ЎгҒ«гҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒЁиұҠеҜҢгҒӘиЁҖиӘһгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’зё®е°ҸгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®зҡ„гҒЁгҒ—гҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’дҪңжҲҗгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒ«гҒҜгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹж–°гҒ—гҒ„еҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒӘгғҮгғјгӮҝгғһгӮӨгғӢгғігӮ°жҠҖиЎ“гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰеҸ–еҫ—гҒ—гҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ§иЁ“з·ҙгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгҖҒгӮ№гғ‘гғјгӮ№гӮІгғјгғҶгғғгғүгғҹгӮҜгӮ№гғҒгғЈгғјгӮӘгғ–гӮЁгӮӯгӮ№гғ‘гғјгғҲгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸжқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒҚиЁҲз®—гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’й–ӢзҷәгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮж•°еҚғгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§иЁ“з·ҙгҒҷгӮӢйҡӣгҒ®йҒҺеӯҰзҝ’гҒ«еҜҫжҠ—гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒЁиЁ“з·ҙгҒ®ж”№е–„гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒҷгӮӢгҖӮйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«гҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜдәәй–“зҝ»иЁігҒ®гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢFlores-200гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒ40,000д»ҘдёҠгҒ®з•°гҒӘгӮӢзҝ»иЁіж–№еҗ‘гҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҖҒдәәй–“и©•дҫЎгҒЁFlores-200гҒ®гҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®иЁҖиӘһгӮ’гӮ«гғҗгғјгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„жҜ’жҖ§гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгӮ’зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒҰзҝ»иЁігҒ®е®үе…ЁжҖ§гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒеҫ“жқҘгҒ®жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜжҠҖиЎ“гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰ44%гҒ®BLEUгҒ®ж”№е–„гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒжҷ®йҒҚзҡ„гҒӘзҝ»иЁігӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®е®ҹзҸҫгҒ«еҗ‘гҒ‘гҒҹйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘеҹәзӣӨгӮ’зҜүгҒ„гҒҹгҖӮжңҖеҫҢгҒ«гҖҒжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§иҝ°гҒ№гҒҹгҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®иІўзҢ®гӮ’гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе…¬й–ӢгҒ—гҖҒhttps://github.com/facebookresearch/fairseq/tree/nllb гҒ§гӮўгӮҜгӮ»гӮ№еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гҖҢNo Language Left BehindгҖҚгғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгғӘгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҢд№ҸгҒ—гҒ„иЁҖиӘһгҒ®ж©ҹжў°зҝ»иЁігӮ’ж”№е–„гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒгғҚгӮӨгғҶгӮЈгғ–гӮ№гғ”гғјгӮ«гғјгҒЁгҒ®гӮӨгғігӮҝгғ“гғҘгғјгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰеҝ…иҰҒжҖ§гӮ’жҳҺгӮүгҒӢгҒ«гҒ—гҖҒгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’й–ӢзҷәгҖӮж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғҮгғјгӮҝгғһгӮӨгғӢгғігӮ°жҠҖиЎ“гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹжқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒҚиЁҲз®—гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒйҒҺеӯҰзҝ’гӮ’йҳІгҒҗгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®иЁ“з·ҙж”№е–„гӮ’иЎҢгҒЈгҒҹгҖӮFlores-200гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§40,000д»ҘдёҠгҒ®зҝ»иЁіж–№еҗ‘гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҖҒеҫ“жқҘжҠҖиЎ“гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰ44%гҒ®BLEUж”№е–„гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҖӮе…ЁгҒҰгҒ®жҲҗжһңгҒҜгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе…¬й–ӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: Improving Neural Machine Translation with Compact Word Embedding Tables, Kumar+, AAAI'22
